narrative:
Pleasant Twp. township has 3,622 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
